tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "open"}))

(def filtered-prs 
  (filter 
    #(and (> (:additions %) 400) 
          (nil? (:closes_linear %)))
    prs))

(def grouped-by-repo (group-by :repo filtered-prs))

(def repo-counts 
  (into {} 
    (map (fn [[repo prs]] [repo (count prs)]) 
         grouped-by-repo)))

(def total-count (count filtered-prs))
